name: RODE VideoMic NTG Hybrid Analog
description: The Rode VideoMic NTG gives video content creators, run-and-gun filmmakers, voiceover artists, and podcasters the sound of the highly regarded NTG shotguns in a convenient camera-mount mic that requires no additional adapters to work with cameras, smartphones

features.Key Features :: Vlogger, Run & Gun, Voiceover, Podcaster | For Cameras, Mobile Devices & Computers | 30-Hour USB Rechargeable Battery | Variable Gain, Pad, Roll-Off & HF Boost | USB Out or 3.5mm Out with Safety Channel | Power Switch with LED and Auto On/Off | Peak Warning LED | Windscreen Reduces Wind Noise | Includes Shoe/Pole Shockmount
features.What's in The Box :: RODE VideoMic NTG Hybrid Analog/USB Camera-Mount Shotgun Microphone | SM7-R Shoe Shockmount | RODE WSVM Shotgun Wind Screen | RODE SC15 Lightning USB Type-C to Lightning Accessory Cable (11.8") | RODE SC16 Straight USB Type-C to Right-Angle USB Type-C Cable (11.8") | RODE SC10 Right-Angle 3.5mm TRRS Cable (12.6")
